docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY KIM, ROY AS TO DEFENDANT REMEDLY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SUSAN REED FILED BY DEFENDANT REMEDLY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-24-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-24-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ROY KIM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REMEDLY, INC. IS PRESENT. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT REMEDLY, INC. IS SUSAN REED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIM, ROY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REMEDLY, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
